title: Resolution Requesting the Twenty-four (24) Member Agencies of Los Baños Science Community Foundation, Inc.,(LBSCFI) to Support the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) in Providing Employment to Its Constituents by Prioritizing and Giving Preference to the Qualified Residents of Los Baños in Hiring of Their Manpower Needs. Councilor Miko C. Pelegrina 01/16/2023
